mapper.select:
/*transferMapper.getTmntPpImgList*/
SELECT CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum FROM ( SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_CAN WHERE TO_CHAR(TRANSFER_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND PPPO <> 'PO' AND CONTRACT_NUM IN (SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE WHERE IMG_PATH LIKE '/jboss/data/%' AND STATUS = 'A') ORDER BY TRANSFER_DTTM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 180
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertCanPpImg*/ INSERT INTO PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE@DL_CAN ( IMG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, IMG_GUBUN, IMG_FILE, IMG_PATH, STATUS, MEMO, REC_ID, REC_DT, ENC_FLAG ) SELECT IMG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, IMG_GUBUN, IMG_FILE, IMG_PATH, STATUS, MEMO, REC_ID, REC_DT, ENC_FLAG FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE A WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE@DL_CAN WHERE IMG_SEQ = A.IMG_SEQ )
mapper.select: /*transferMapper.getScanFilePpsCustomerImage*/ SELECT IMG_SEQ AS imgSeq , IMG_PATH AS fileInfo , SUBSTR(IMG_FILE, 0, INSTR(IMG_FILE, '.')-1) AS fileId FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND IMG_PATH LIKE '/jboss/data/%' AND STATUS = 'A'
mapper.update: /*transferMapper.insertCanPpsCustomerImage*/ INSERT INTO PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE@DL_CAN ( IMG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, IMG_GUBUN, IMG_FILE, IMG_PATH, STATUS, MEMO, REC_ID, REC_DT, ENC_FLAG ) SELECT IMG_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, IMG_GUBUN, IMG_FILE, IMG_PATH, STATUS, MEMO, REC_ID, REC_DT, ENC_FLAG FROM PPS_CUSTOMER_IMAGE A WHERE IMG_SEQ = #{imgSeq}
